:::{.footer-banner .column-screen}

:::{.grid}
:::{.g-col-12 .g-col-md-2}
### Published by
[![](/imgs/bsg-logo.svg)](https://www.bsg.ox.ac.uk)
:::
:::{.g-col-12 .g-col-md-2}
:::
:::{.g-col-12 .g-col-md-2}
:::
:::{.g-col-12 .g-col-md-2 .useful-links}
### Useful links
- [About the project](/about/index.qmd)
- [Privacy](/about/privacy.qmd)
- [Accessibility](/about/accessibility.qmd)
:::
:::{.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### Copyright & licensing
All visualizations, data and articles produced by the Blavatnik School of
Government are open access under the Creative Commons BY licence. You have
permission to use, distribute and reproduce these in any medium, provided the
source and authors are credited. All the software are code we write is open
source and made available via GitHub using the permissive MIT license.

All other material, including data produced by third parties and made available
by the Blavatnik School of Government, is subject to the license terms from the
original third-party authors.

Please consult our full [legal notices](/about/legal.qmd).
:::
:::

:::
